problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: If Shape memory alloy phase transition is applied to low, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
